STEP A BIT CLOSER, RIGHT THERE, HAHAHA!

He who has returned from beyond has taught me secrets you can't even grasp!
You can't hope to penetrate my shields!
Do you really think you could beat me?
We will open the rift for a new time to come!
The end of times has come!
The great machinator will make his entrance soon!
You might scratch my shields but they will never break!
You can learn a lot from us.
Our wisdom and knowledge are unequalled in this world.
That knowledge would overburden your fragile mind.
I wouldn't expect you to understand.
One day Yalahar will return to its former glory.
Since you didn't eat your spinach Bogey comes to get you!
Too bad you did not eat your lunch, now I have to punish you!
Even if you beat me, I'll hide in your closet until you one day drop your guard!
You better had believe in me!
I'll take you into the darkness ... forever!
You are no match for the scourge of the seas!
You move like a seasick whale!
I might use some parts of you in my next creation!
You're only a testsubject to me!
You can't beat what you can't comprehend!
You won't stop my masterplan to flood the world market with fake Bonelord language dictionaries!
My calculations tell me you'll die!
Beware! My evil monolog is coming!
I have a contract here which you should sign!
I sence so much potential in you. It's almost a shame I have to kill you.
Yes, slay me for the loot I might have. Give in to your greed.
Wealth, Power, it is all at your fingertips. All you have to do is a bit blackmailing and bullying.
Come on. being a bit evil won't hurt you.
I WILL SET THE WORLD ON FIRE!
Close your eyes... I have something for you.
I am the beast with two faces!
How can you be that dumb?
Harmony is just a vain illusion!
I'm ashamed of my former self!
You are mad to challange a demon prince!
You can't stop me or my plans!
All will have to bow to me!
With this power I can crush everyone!
You won't rest in peace! Never ever!
Dreams can come true. As my dream of killing you.
I kept my axe sharp, especially for you!
Time for a little torturing practice!
Let me tickle you with my trident!
I've beaten tougher demons then you even know!
You puny humans will be my snacks!
Even I fear the wrath of the princes. And the cold touch of those whom they serve! You are not prepared!
You foolish mortals with you medding you brought the end upon your world!
After all those aeons I smell freedom at last!
FIRST I'LL OBLITERATE YOU THEN I BURN THIS PRISON DOWN!!
I'M TOO HOT FOR YOU TO HANDLE!
THE POWER OF HIS INTERNAL FIRE RENEWS OMRAFIR!
I WILL RULE WHEN THE NEW ORDER IS ESTABLISHED!
INFERNATIL! COME HERE AND FIGHT ME YOU COWARD!
They used you fools to escape and they left ME behind!!??
NOT EVEN AEONS OF IMPRISONMENT WILL STOP ME!
EVEN WITH ALL THAT TIME IN THE PRISON THAT WEAKENED ME, YOU ARE NO MATCH TO ME!
Terofar cast a greater death curse on you!
IT TOOK AN ARMY OF YOUR KIND TO DEFEAT THE WARDEN. NOW YOU ARE ALONE!
THE WARDS ARE FAILING! MY ESCAPE IS ONLY A MATTER OF TIME!!
FEELS GOOD TO BE BACK IN ACTION!
You have been chosen for a harvest!
The mirrors can't contain the night.
I can give you a hand... or two.
Bones are just sticks. They break easily.
I'm not here. I am there.
The night is coming for you.
Too late... No turning back now.
Healing is what I do best.
I'll take your place when you are gone.
The smell of fear follows you.
I'll take your place when you are gone.
Look into my eyes! No, the other ones!
The mirrors can't contain the night!
Healing is what I do best.
I'll take your place when you are gone.
I love the smell of rotten flesh.
The earth will take you back.
I could be your evil twin!
I'll take your place when you are gone.
I'll take your place when you are gone.
Look into my eyes! No, the other ones!
The mirrors can't contain the night!
I have travelled far to fight here.
Stand still! Both of you! hicks
This victory will earn me a casket of beer.
I'll kill you slow and painful.
You are too soft for a fight.
You will pay for imprisoning me here.
YOU CAN'T KEEP ME HERE FOREVER
Don't run, You're burning off precious fat.
I bet you wish you weren't here.
When the dust settles there will only be one.
I will turn you into ashes.
I hope you like my voice!
Let us dance the dance of death.
If you think I am too old to fight then you're wrong.
I've forgotten more things than you have ever learned!
Let me teach you a few things youngster!
I'll teach you respect for the old!
To be the man you have to beat the man!
You are no match for a master of the Mooh'Tha!
I might be fallen but you will fall before me!
I am like the merciless northwind.
Snow will be your death shroud.
Feel the wrath of father chyll!
Revenge is sweetest when served cold.
No mommy NO, Leave me alone!
The cat has grown some horns!
What was I doing here again?
Didn't you leave your house door open?
I am the test that you won't pass!
I'll crush you beneath my feet!
You are not clever enough to defeat me!
The slyness of foxes will deceive the unwary!
You are my next meal! Grrr!
RAAAARGH! I'M MASHING YE TO DUST BOOM!
Flee as long as you can.
I'LL FREEZE YOU THEN I CRUSH YOU!
Flee as long as you can.
Flee as long as you can!
Annihilon's might will crush you all!
We are the right hand and the left hand of the seven!
I'll sacrifice yours souls to seven!
I'm bad news for you mortals!
Your puny skills are no match for me.
I might reward you for killing my brother ~ with a swift death!
We are the brothers of fear!
I am going to play with yourself!
No one matches my battle prowess!
I teach you that even heroes can die!
You will die begging like the others did!
You can't run or hide forever!
I'm the executioner of the Seven!
The judgement is guilty! The sentence is death!
You will run out of resources soon enough!
One little mistake and you're all are mine!
I know you will show a weakness!
Your fear will make you prone to mistakes!
Surrender and I'll end it quick.
I've studied the Cobras - I wield the secrets of the snake!
I am a true knight of the lion, you will never defeat the true order!
The Falcons will come to my aid in need!

Conhecimento roubado de Lifesteal.name: Conhecimento roubado de Lifesteal
Conhecimento roubado de Lifesteal.description: Um Conhecimento Roubado de Roubo de Vida

voices.text: Witness the might of The Order of the Falcon!
Flinch even once, and I will crush every fiber within you!
There is nothing here for you and you will die alone.
You will obey and you will kneel and you will BOW TO US.
The Scourge Of Oblivion prepares a devestating attack!
The Scourge Of Oblivion activates its reflective shields!
NOOOO! NOW YOU HERETICS WILL FACE MY GODLY WRATH!
ZHE TIME OF ZHE SNAKE HAZ COME!
YOU DON'T EVEN UNDERSTAND WHOM YOU ARE SERVING!
YOU HAVE BEEN USED AND FOOLED!
I WILL STOP YOU ONCE AND FOR ALL!
I was the shadow that haunted the cradle of humanity!
Your worthles existence will nourish something greater!
I exist since eons and you want to defy me?
Can you feel the passage of time, mortal?
To me, creatures of the wild!
My instincts tell me about your cowardice.
Mine is the power of rage!
I pray to my mazzterzz, the mighty dragonzzz!
You are not worzzy to touch zzizz zzacred ground!
NO ONE WILL STOP ME THIS TIME!
I returned from death and you dream about defeating me?
Witness the first seconds of my eternal world domination!
Even in my weakened state I will crush you all!
COME AND GIVE ME SOME AMUSEMENT
IS THAT THE BEST YOU HAVE TO OFFER, TIBIANS?
I AM GHAZBARAN OF THE TRIANGLE... AND I AM HERE TO CHALLENGE YOU ALL.
I will rope you up! All of you!
Have you seen my old pal Frack?
A MIC to rule them all!
Let me put my rope around your neck!
I AM MORGAROTH, LORD OF THE TRIANGLE... AND YOU ARE LOST!
MY SEED IS FEAR AND MY HARVEST ARE YOUR SOULS!
ZATHROTH! LOOK AT THE DESTRUCTION I AM CAUSING IN YOUR NAME!
THE TRIANGLE OF TERROR WILL RISE!
You will rise as my servant!
PRAISED BE MY MASTERS, THE RUTHLESS SEVEN!
Be prepared for the day my masters will come for you!
A battle makes the blood so hot and sweet.
Feel the hungry kiss of death!
The monsters in the mirror will come eat your dreams.
Your pitiful life has come to an end!
I will squish you like a maggot and suck you dry!
Some day I shall see my beautiful face in a mirror again.
YOU BETTER DIE TO MY MINIONS BECAUSE YOU'LL WISH YOU DID IF I COME FOR YOU!
I will make you all pay!
No one will stop my plans!
I'm Zulazza, and you won't forget me that fazzt.
Oh, HE will take revenge on zzizz azzault when you zztep in front of HIZZ fazze!
Zzaion is our last zztand! I will not leave wizzout a fight!
Behind zze Great Gate liezz your doom!

bestiary.Locations: In almost all grassy areas of Tibia. Also found in Rookgaard.
In the crocodile cave and the jungle east of Port Hope as well as the swamp to the north

voices.text: I can't work wizh zuch dizturbancez!
Where are zhe guardz when you need zhem!
Fear the wrath of the wronged!
The Moon Goddess has forsaken us!
Death is too good for them.

bestiary.Locations: Sea Serpent Area and Seacrest Grounds.
Seacrest Grounds when Quara Renegades are not spawning.

voices.text: THE DARK TIDE WILL SWALLOW YOU...

bestiary.Locations: Stampor Cave on the Muggy Plains
Forbidden Lands around the Lightbringers basin.
Ancient Temple under the Rotworm area
Deep in the Pits of Inferno
Horestis Tomb during one of the states of The Mummys Curse World Change.

voices.text: I hope you are enjoying your sparring Sir or Ma'am!
Please feel free to hit me Sir or Ma'am!

bestiary.Locations: Single one under the White Flower Temple in Thais (respawn takes about 20-25 minutes)

voices.text: Dance for me your dance of death!
Feel my gentle kiss of death.
That's what I call easy listening!
We came tooo thiiiiss wooorld to... get youuu!

bestiary.Locations: Ancient Temple in the Skeleton area
Around the higher level areas of Drefia

voices.text: You will endure agony beyond thy death!
You will not get my treasure.
We will make you one of us!
Life is such a fickle thing!
Let's battle it out in a duel!
I'll fight here in eternity and beyond.
Another foolish adventurer who tries to beat me.

bestiary.Locations: West of Edron in the Lost Mines.

voices.text: These mine is ours... you shall not pass.
I call you, my bats! Come!

bestiary.Locations: Drefia and Vampire Castle on Vengoth

voices.text: Come, let me kiss you, darling. Oh wait, I meant kill.
Enjoy the pain - I know you love it.
You won't regret you came to me, sweetheart.
Don't struggle. We don't want to waste a drop of blood now, do we?
The dark ones.. must be stopped... unholy, twisted, EVIL!
No... don't go further stranger... danger lies in every step...

bestiary.Locations: All around Port Hope and Tiquanda
Atop of the Formorgar Glacier and deep inside Formorgar Mines
Gnome Deep Hub north and south tasking areas
The Hive towers: on the highest floor of each tower
The Hive surface during the Hive Born World Change's third stage.
Found in various caves and plains around Tibia (including Rookgaard).
Can be found in Truffels Garden as well as the Mushroom Gardens.
